BA BOT - Big Ambitions automation mod
=====================================

QUICK INSTALL
  1. Make sure you have MelonLoader installed in Big Ambitions, and have launched
     the game once (so it generates its assemblies).
     MelonLoader: https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader.Installer
  2. Windows 11: turn OFF Smart App Control, or it will block the mod.
     (Windows Security > App & browser control > Smart App Control > Off)
  3. Double-click  install.bat  and follow the prompts.
  4. Launch Big Ambitions and press  F8  in-game to open the BA BOT panel.

TO REMOVE
  Double-click  uninstall.bat

WHAT IT DOES
  An in-game control panel (F8): live cash/day status, quick actions (+$1,000,
  Energy 100%), Time-skip (AFK fast-forward), Auto-wellbeing (keeps energy up),
  and toggles for upcoming automation. Single-player only; back up your saves.

Source + updates: https://github.com/ItsRealDennis/BigAmbitionsAutomation
